programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: 'S1/E29'. Love Monster has to pick the winner in a talent competition but its hard when all the contestants are his friends.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Go Jet Academy: Artificial Reef'. Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - Everglades National Park, Florida'. The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: Rastamouse
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Da Mousa Lisa'. The president needs the rodent to solve an artistic mystery when an old painting no longer looks like it is supposed to.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Allosaurus and Dragonfly'. Andy Day attempts to catch the breed of dragonfly that a baby Allosaurus hunts and eats, and watches as more hatch from their eggs and take their first step.

programme.title: Andy's Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Paraceratherium and Footprint'. Andy arrives 30 million years ago in Mongolia, where he meets the paraceratherium, a giant mammal five times the size of a rhinoceros.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - Andy and The Sand Grouse'. Andy takes to his safari mobile and jets off to the Kalahari Desert in Africa. His mission, to find out how sand grouse chicks drink water.

programme.title: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programme.desc: When the toys of the Night Garden can't sleep, the Zonk leads them to the Zonky Zoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

programme.title: Catie's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Farm Machines'. Catie tests out three amazing machines that are used on farms: a tractor, an asparagus harvester and a combine harvester.

programme.title: My Pet And Me: Vet Tales
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Lemmy the Rabbit'. Ferne meets Bella at a city farm as they prepare to take Lemmy, one of their rabbits, to the vet to have his overgrown teeth looked at.

programme.title: My Pet And Me
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - New Pet'. Ferne visits Jess and Toby, who are about to adopt some new pets from an animal shelter. They meet Marie from the shelter, who talks to them about the responsibility of owning pets.

programme.title: The Numtums
programme.desc: 'S1/E43'. The Numtums are on a quest to find the Lesser Spotted Ladybird and to find Larry who has the Super Numtum comic.

programme.title: The Numtums

programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Matterhorn, Italy and Switzerland'. Glitch gets into a mountain of trouble as the Go Jetters attempt to climb the Matterhorn.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - A Runaway Cow'. Postman Pat and his faithful cat Jess have joined the Special Delivery Service - they must deliver anything, anytime, anywhere.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Blackbirds'. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how blackbirds play an important role in the environment.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Bitzer's New Hat'. Bitzer is given a horrible new hat by the Farmer and gets upset. While the flock try to cheer him up Shaun goes to find where the old one is.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Hide and Squeak'. When a cute mouse shows up Pidsley must dispose of the creature. But when it takes shelter in Shaun's fleece the flock persuade Shaun to protect it.

programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Grace's Favourite Machines'. Grace looks back at her favourite land, water and air machines, but which will they be?

programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Noddy and the Case of the Unhelpful Queen'. Young Noddy becomes a detective as he and his friends set out to solve mysteries in Toyland.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - The Case of the Mystery Artist'. Young Noddy becomes a detective as he and his friends set out to solve mysteries in Toyland.

programme.title: Down On The Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. A series looking at what happens on farms, from livestock to harvesting, as well as where food comes from and how it's grown.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Bathtime'. The flock refuse to have a wash in the freezing sheep dip, so Shaun goes on a commando raid to hi-jack the hot water from the Farmer's bath tub.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Big Top Timmy'. A circus sets up in a nearby field, and a spellbound Timmy wanders off to investigate. Can Shaun rescue him before the Farmer notices he's gone?

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Kevin Hart

programme.title: Christmas Everyday Aka Christmas Freak
programme.desc: Christmas comes just once a year. But for Rudy, every day is Christmas. And every day is perfect. Because Christmas is perfect. At least that's what Rudy tells himself.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.desc: A comical nurse practitioner who treats his patients in an unconventional way, is challenged by a tough and stubborn patient but is determined to show him the bright side.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: A recently slain cop joins a team of un-dead police officers working for the Rest in Peace Department and tries to find the man who murdered him.

programme.desc: Two very different families converge on Martha's Vineyard one weekend for a wedding.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Two mismatched security guards are thrown together to bust a smuggling operation.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: A DEA agent and an undercover Naval Intelligence officer are unwittingly investigating each other and end up stealing mob money for the good guys.

programme.title: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: A powerful drama of murder, prejudice and dignity, based on the Pulitzer Prize winning play A Soldier's Story.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Ocean looks at the policies & projects designed to protect our seas. Ocean explores the themes of pollution and marine life, the blue economy, sustainable fishing, aquaculture, climate change, ocean energy and more.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Ocean'. A ground-breaking journey from tropical shallow seas to the mysterious depths, Attenborough reveals extraordinary new worlds and unique animal behaviours in the ocean.

programme.title: Britain's Most Beautiful Road
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Documentary travelogue on the North Coast 400, a scenic touring route that navigates the wilds of the Northern Highlands.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Philippines'. Martin explores the Philippines, from Manila's jeepneys to remote tribal burials.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E14 - Transitions'. Alaskans harness the power of the sun as they toil through summer.

programme.title: The Secret Genius Of Modern Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Vacuum Cleaner'. Hannah takes a look at the vacuum cleaner, going behind the scenes with Dyson and discovering how the motor in their latest vacuum spins nine times faster than that of a Formula One race car.

programme.title: Stephen Fry in Central America
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mexico'. Stephen Fry explores Mexico in his yellow American school bus. In Mexico city he takes part in a soap opera, while on the Pacific coast he is entranced by the courage of the Acapulco cliff divers.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Ocean'. A ground-breaking journey from tropical shallow seas to the mysterious depths, Attenborough reveals extraordinary new worlds and unique animal behaviours in the ocean.

programme.title: Arctic Vets
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Onyx, the only female in Assiniboine Park Conservancy's pack of rescued wolves has a mass on her mammary gland, and Dr Chris and the vet team must rush to remove it.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - NATO's AWACS'. In this episode, the eyes in the sky, the distinctive aircraft with a huge radar dome mounted on its roof - NATO's incredible Airborne Warning And Control System.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Boka Vanguard'. In this episode, the planets largest heavy lift ship, capable of carrying the Eiffel Tower and the Statue of Liberty at the same time, it's a giant of the seas.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - F35'. In this episode, the world's newest advanced fighter aircraft - the incredible F35 Lightening II - and three of the most pioneering innovative aircraft that paved the way for it.

programme.title: Earth's Great Rivers
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 of 3 - Zambezi'. The extraordinary animals, landscapes and people who live alongside iconic rivers.

programme.title: Earth's Great Rivers
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 of 3 - Danube'. The extraordinary animals, landscapes and people who live alongside iconic rivers.

programme.title: Stephen Fry in Central America
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mexico'. Stephen Fry explores Mexico in his yellow American school bus. In Mexico city he takes part in a soap opera, while on the Pacific coast he is entranced by the courage of the Acapulco cliff divers.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Congo'. In the Congo, ingenious chimpanzees steal honey from hard-working sweat bees by engineering a large stick to smash open the nest.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Cape'. This episode reveals how the clash of two currents - one warm, one cold - creates the incredible spectacle of the 'sardine run' off the Great Cape.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E1 - Pulled from the Darkness'. As Alaskans enter a new dawn in the Arctic winter, they must adapt to the changing landscape if they are to survive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E2 - Like Ghosts'. The Hailstones produce an original work of Inupiaq art, and Cole Sturgis ventures into the wilds of the Southeast on a life-or-death hunt.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E3 - On the Auroras'. Alaskans confront the environment, and themselves, as winter bears down.

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. In this episode we explore the wilderness lines that have pushed the frontiers of human endeavour into to previously unknown territories, solving a set of complex problems along the way.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Ocean'. A ground-breaking journey from tropical shallow seas to the mysterious depths, Attenborough reveals extraordinary new worlds and unique animal behaviours in the ocean.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Tony Robinson leaps into the future to explore artificial intelligence. From a humanoid robot that answers back, to the little workhorses that make next-day delivery possible.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Southern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores Catholic island life and whether the physical aspect of the landscape makes it easier to make spiritual connections.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E15 - The Way of the Bear'. Alaskans must capitalize on the resources of the Arctic Summer.

programme.title: Britain's Most Beautiful Road
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Meet members of a remote community as they try to revive a much-loved tradition.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Ocean'. A ground-breaking journey from tropical shallow seas to the mysterious depths, Attenborough reveals extraordinary new worlds and unique animal behaviours in the ocean.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E3 - Santorini, Naxos and Siphnos'. Bettany heads to Santorini, the site of one of the biggest volcanic eruptions in history, before heading over to Naxos and then Siphos.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S3 - Easter: It's Fashion, Bunny!'. Sunny Anderson has the bakers use nail art patterns as inspiration for geometric tarts. Then, they model their edible Easter hats on the bunny-walk!

programme.title: Chopped Sweets
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Sugary Showpieces'. Four chefs craft towering architectural desserts. First they face challenging duck offal and play with chocolate, strawberry and peanut flavours in round two.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S51/E13 - Epic BLT Battle'. The chefs find BLT-themed ingredients in every basket, including a cheesy-creamy comfort food in the first round and a lettuce-flavoured ingredient for dessert.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mama Mia, What A Meatball!'. Inspired by his mother's cooking, Michael masters chicken meatball parmesan on the grill. Plus, Liz whips up a simple vinegar and cream dressing.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Comfort Classics And Fruity Cocktails'. Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham. Later, Liz joins him to prepare her favourite summertime cocktail.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Dad's Sticky Ribs And Decadent Cookies'. Michael turns the backyard grill into a smoker for making his dad's favourite sticky ribs. Later, Liz bakes some giant cookies.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Thrill Of Pizza On The Grill'. Chef Michael Symon turns his standard outdoor grill into a pizza oven. Later, Liz joins him to make sweet Italian cookies.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - All Greek To Me'. Michael pays homage to his Greek heritage by making a grilled lamb burger with tzatziki. Plus, Liz creates the perfect drink to compliment the meal.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Meats And Sweets Feel The Heat'. Michael makes a tasty Mediterranean dish layered with meat, vegetables and cheese sauce. Later, Liza prepares a side dish of steamed artichokes.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Italian Feast On Fire'. Michael Symon creates an Italian feast with fettuccine and smoked tomato sauce. For dessert, he makes a decadent lemon upside-down cake.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Familystyle Fish Fry'. Michael Symon uses his grill to make fish fry with lime aioli smashed potatoes. Later, Liz makes a side dish of pickled zucchini salad.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Parm And Polenta Cake Make Everything Better'. Michael makes grilled eggplant parmesan with salami and provolone salad. Plus, Liz bakes a cherry polenta cake.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Clambake On The Grill'. Chef Michael Symon prepares clams with sausage, peppers and onions. Later, Liz makes a refreshing rose sangria to accompany the meal.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S28/E8 - Thanks A Brunch, Dad!'. The team serves up a scrumptious brunch that dads will love. There's everything from a bagel breakfast casserole to a strawberry pandowdy.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S44/E12 - Lighten Up!'. Four chefs are tasked with creating low-calorie dishes. Can they whip up a tasty appetiser using almond coconut bites, cod fillets and oyster mushroom chips?

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S9/E10 - Location, Location, Location'. The bakers make cakes based on a specific biome: rainforest, desert or coral reef. The winner gets $25,000 and the title of Kids Baking Champion!

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S1 - Spring Bounty'. Host Sunny Anderson welcomes seven bakers to the competition. They attempt to impress the judges with their jellybean-inspired pop art pastry tarts.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S1 - Sweet And Tart'. Host Sunny Anderson challenges the remaining six bakers to create Easter candy-inspired bonnets. Which competitor will fail to impress and be sent home?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S27/E3 - Barbecue And Beer Can Chicken'. Guy Fieri grabs some crazy grub! In Hawaii he finds a funky joint serving beer can chicken. Plus, he stops at a downtown barbecue spot in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S27/E4 - Ocean Coasts And Great Lakes'. Guy Fieri seeks out dynamite dishes from the coasts to the Great Lakes. He discovers outrageous octopus tostadas and gourmet grilled cheese sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S27/E5 - A Passport Of Flavor'. Guy Fieri cruises from Texas to Michigan for cuisine with international flair, including shawarma, brisket banh mi, tequila croissants and old-school sourdough.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S27/E6 - Old Faces, New Places'. Guy Fieri visits some familiar faces and checks out their new places. They include a seafood spot in Fairhope, AK, and Chinese cuisine in Miami.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S27/E7 - From Pied To Fried'. Guy Fieri scours the US for amazing food. He checks out ramen in St. Petersburg, FL and a funky joint frying up chicken gizzards in Lansing, MI.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S27/E8 - Sammies And Spice'. Guy Fieri hunts down standout sandwiches. He tries a primo pork burger in Longmont, CO, and some serious spice with fiery Thai specialties in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S12/E2 - Jumping For Joy'. Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman ask the kid bakers to honour a classic playground game by making blondie hopscotch puzzles! One baker will be hopping home.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S3 - Easter: It's Fashion, Bunny!'. Sunny Anderson has the bakers use nail art patterns as inspiration for geometric tarts. Then, they model their edible Easter hats on the bunny-walk!

programme.title: Everyday Wow!
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Chef Katlego demonstrates how to cook great food in a simple way. He has clever tricks to get the best out of his ingredients and create delicious dishes.

programme.title: Everyday Wow!
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Chef Katlego demonstrates how to cook great food in a simple way. He has clever tricks to get the best out of his ingredients and create delicious dishes.

programme.title: Everyday Wow!
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Chef Katlego demonstrates how to cook great food in a simple way. He has clever tricks to get the best out of his ingredients and create delicious dishes.

programme.title: Hot Dish With Franco
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Easy Entertaining'. Franco Noriega makes fresh bruschetta, easy risotto, tangy chicken and a fruity salad for a quick weeknight meal that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Hot Dish With Franco
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - A Mexican Feast'. Franco Noriega makes a Mexican feast highlighting his Vegetable Ceviche. Then, he whips up grilled shrimp and pineapple tacos with pineapple guacamole.

programme.title: Kids BBQ Championship
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Backyard BBQ'. Seven kid cooks are challenged to make a hot dog with at least one grilled topping. The winner earns a major advantage in the elimination round.

programme.title: BBQ USA
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Risk It For The Brisket'. Michael Symon visits the Lone Star State for the Cedar Fest BBQ Cook-Off. The teams compete in ribs, chicken, and pork, but the real star is brisket.

programme.title: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up some of his favourite hometown haunts. He pops into a Mexican joint in Santa Rosa, CA, for pozole and grabs New York-style pizza in Eureka, CA.

programme.title: Triple D Nation: International Affair
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a Vietnamese sandwich shop in Salt Lake City and meets a Greek chef making Mexican dishes in Texas. And, a joint in Arizona serves up true German flavour.

programme.title: Outchef'd
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Scott Conant Vs Gabrielle'. Eddie Jackson hosts a great chicken battle between Army veteran Gabrielle and celebrity chef Scott Conant. Who will flap their way to victory?

programme.title: Outchef'd
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Eddie Jackson has an amazing surprise for New York firefighter Stephen when he's put head-to-head against famous chef Anne Burrell.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S13/E9 - Long Days, Late Night BBQ Date'. For her late-night date night with Nick, Molly Yeh makes her juicy steak party sub and scrumptious grilled potato salad with zhoung mayo.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S13/E10 - Cool Mom On The Go!'. Molly Yeh shares simple recipes to make life a little less complicated. She makes her Midwestern oatmeal cookie salads and a fluffy harissa potato chip frittata.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E4 - Ree-freshed'. Ree Drummond refreshes some of her favourite dishes. She makes delicious skirt steak and sweet potato fries and rustles up a Tex-Mex chicken pot pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E5 - Easy And Elegant'. Ree Drummond cooks up simple and refined dishes. She makes crab cakes and 5-ingredient remoulade and peppercorn-crusted steak with pimento creamed spinach.

programme.title: Kids BBQ Championship
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Backyard BBQ'. Seven kid cooks are challenged to make a hot dog with at least one grilled topping. The winner earns a major advantage in the elimination round.

programme.title: BBQ USA
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Risk It For The Brisket'. Michael Symon visits the Lone Star State for the Cedar Fest BBQ Cook-Off. The teams compete in ribs, chicken, and pork, but the real star is brisket.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Journey To Perl Island'. Otto, Jane & Shane transport a cabin to the distant and uninhabited Perl Island. But things take a sinister turn when they discover a predator on the loose.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - A Hunt Above The Clouds'. Changing weather forces the Kilchers to venture miles from home in search of food for winter. Eivin and Eve stalk big game above the clouds.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Nova Overload'. Jayson and Amanda get a '65 Chevy II Nova for a bargain, but when the team starts work on it they soon realise rat nests and rust are the least of their worries.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Holiday Special'. A balloon-powered sleigh is built to deliver presents, snow is made and covers Kevin's front lawn and holiday decorations are deployed in record time.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - David Meet Goliath'. Mouthy leadership, fired-up tempers, and high-pressure situations dominate a tension-filled night when South Carolina race against the St. Louis crew.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - We Got Bad Blood'. For the second heat, Kye Kelley and his NOLA racers take on Birdman and his team from Texas. As the rivals battle, car trouble stops one team in its tracks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Local Legends'. Guy finds some places that have been drawing the crowds for years. He tries gourmet specials in Maine, amazing ribs in Oklahoma and home-made bread in New York.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: 'S5/E19 - Termite Researcher'. In Louisiana Mike Rowe discovers he can't keep up with the crawfish pickers. Plus, how do termite researchers find and remove the destructive creepy crawlies?

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Treasure Map From Space'. Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos dives the waters of Campeche, Mexico in search of shipwrecks first located by astronaut Gordon Cooper from space in 1963.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S5/E58 - 5/58'. Find out how alkaline batteries are manufactured, wheelchairs are built, flutes are made and cowboy boots are produced, as more items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - First-Round Knockout'. The race war continues between Team NOLA and Texas in a battle that comes down to which team can race best under pressure. Which team will come out on top?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Civil War'. Quinn and his family of racers face off against Chris Rankin's team. Rankin's team haven't raced together before, but could Quinn's temper ruin his chance of victory?

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: 'S5/E9 - '65 Falcon Ready For Take-Off'. A former pro wrestler wants to restore a cult classic for his 50th birthday: a 1965 Ford Falcon. He puts his trust in Joe Martin and his top team.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Bare Bones To Showstopper'. A customer returns to the shop with a prized possession, a Chevy 5-window truck. But it may have some unsalvageable damage from a previous restoration.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Weird Science'. Science is getting stranger and stranger - and it's all caught on camera. Featuring a ghost ship, a memory master, and a bear that walks like a human.

programme.title: How The Universe Works
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Stars'. Right now in the universe's giant furnaces stars are being born. See how their creation changed the cosmos forever, leading to planets and life itself.

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. More logistical headaches when one load master stows £100million of super yacht onto a vessel carrier. Plus an operations supervisor loads a rare three-wheeled sports car.

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mega Yards'. In the South Korean shipyards of Okpo and Sungdong, two teams are building a giant tanker - the Maersk Tangier - along with the world's biggest jack-up rig - the XLE4.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: 'S8/E4'. People from all over America try to revamp old cars, but sometimes they can't finish the job. Now, mechanics are here to help and get the bangers back on the road.

programme.title: Ultimate Car Build-Off
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hill-Climbing Hearse'. Speed Unlimited and Hollywood Hot Rods compete to transform their hearses into hill climbers. Who will win this extreme incline challenge?

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: 'S5/E23 - On Thin Ice'. Exposed on jagged granite peaks in heavy snow, Grady and Bill fight the bitter cold of Idaho's Sawtooth Mountains, where a rookie error could end their journey.

programme.desc: 'S10/E38 - Some Mo' Mr Nice Guy'. It's back to Moreno Valley, where Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up, Darrell's tubular locker tests out OK.

programme.desc: 'S11/E4 - Ivy Gets the Runaround'. In Stanton, Dave finds that sometimes, making a profit is like pulling teeth. Mary grinds to get into the black, while Ivy's locker ends up sucking and blowing.

programme.title: Koppieteefontein
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 of 13'. Hierdie week gaan drink Jak de Priester 'n koppie tee by die beeldskone sangeres en aanbieder Nadine, in Pretoria.

programme.title: Elders
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 of 13'. Erns leer seil in La Rochelle en ontmoet die Springbok Dillyn Leyds by sy rugbyklub. Hy reis na die sprokiesmooi Sarlat-la-Caneda en kuier met die geliefde skrywer Marita van der Vyver.

programme.title: Medies
programme.desc: 'S5/E35 of 48'. Neuroloog dr Etienne van der Walt verduidelik wat met jou brein gebeur tydens 'n nagrus. Oor-neus-en-keelspesialis dr Pieter Troost bespreek slaapapnee. Jonel Basson gee slaapwenke vir babas.

programme.title: Koortjies Met Jonathan Rubain
programme.desc: 'S4/E40 of 46'. Hierdie week kom inspireer Avril Albetti van kykNET se realiteitsreeks, Die Brug, en pastoor Dominque Adonis, ons met hulle stories. Pastoor Jeffery Williams bederf ons met sy sang.

programme.title: Toks & Tjops
programme.desc: 'S13/E47 of 47'. Sport en vriende, wat meer kan mens vra. Kom kuier saam met die span en gesels oor rugby, netbal en nog vele meer. Tommy is in die kombuis en Rika maak seker die glase bly vol.

programme.title: Musiekvideo's
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 2'. Musiekvideo's vir elke smaak.

programme.title: ontbytSAKE

programme.title: Die Boodskap
programme.desc: 'S10/E51 of 55'. Inspirasie vir jou lewensreis vanuit Mosaïek gemeente. Saam met Johan Geyser verken ons dat ons die vermoë het om goeie, lewegewende verhoudings tot stand te bring.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E191 of 260'. Lexi wil nie weer vir 'n gek gehou word nie, terwyl Naomi rooi sien oor Brian. Rian en Uys het weer 'n gesprek oor die liefde. At hoor skokkende nuus, en Tracy probeer Conrad bemoedig.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E192 of 260'. Danny het nie goeie nuus vir Naomi nie, terwyl At vir Annetjie in die oë moet kyk. Tracy ontvang 'n interessante geskenk, en At probeer Conrad en Annelize verseker van sy besluit.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E193 of 260'. Verlore liefde krap ou wonde oop, en Bonnie is in die sewende hemel. 'n Verkeerde diagnose lei tot konfrontasie, en Louis sukkel met vergifnis. Annelize maak haar hart teenoor Steve oop.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E194 of 260'. Zee verkwalik haarself en sluit vir Danny uit. Uys is koud teenoor Febe, en Tracy speel nie oop kaarte met Tertius nie. Annetjie is 'n eregas, en Letitia Snyman arriveer by At se plaas.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E195 of 260'. Danny is bekommerd oor Zee, en Uys en Febe begrawe die strydbyl. Geweerskote lei tot angs en 'n ernstige besering. Uys word uitgevang, en Annelize maak 'n bekentenis aan At.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E235 of 260'. Angie nooi nog mense om by Wade te kom joga doen. Danni begin weer by JPD werk en Nazeem hoor van Tim se frustrasies.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E236 of 260'. Danni en Siya probeer hulle verskille opsy skuif, terwyl Rhafiek skepties is oor Sammy se intensies. Tim probeer JPD se raad van iets oortuig en Wade gee nog 'n jogaklas.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E237 of 260'. Die Thulis is by 'n kruispad en Mrs J spring in om te help. Mymoena dink alles verloop goed met haar en Sammy, maar ontdek die teenoorgestelde.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E238 of 260'. Mymoena maak vrede met Nazeem, maar die spanning tussen haar en Rhafiek kook oor. Brendan sukkel met die nuwe reëling tussen Siya en Danni, terwyl Tim al meer gefrustreerd raak met sy werk.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E239 of 260'. Zoë kry snuf in die neus omdat Tim so besig is. Mymoena en Sammy sukkel sonder mekaar, terwyl die Thulis probeer om dinge uit te praat.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S6/E89 of 144'. Bompie laat vir Desmond glo dat dit maklik gaan wees om die IT-sentrum te bestuur. Koppe kan nie die leerders oorreed om by sy aanlynbesigheid betrokke te raak nie.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S6/E90 of 144'. Janice vind meer inligting uit oor die Galants se planne. Daniel ontmoet vir Danté en wil meer weet oor sy toekomsplanne. Beatrice en Kyle praat oor hulle verlede.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S6/E91 of 144'. Janice en Lee-Roy word teleurgestel deur 'n aflewering wat nie plaasvind nie. 'n Nuwe skurk bedreig die gemeenskap. Bianca sit haar voet neer ná Saartjie en haar nuwe kêrel dinge te ver vat.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S6/E92 of 144'. Janice en Lee-Roy probeer bewyse insamel oor die Galants se onwettige handelinge. Danté wil hê Saartjie moet eerlik wees met haar ma oor hulle toekomsplanne.

programme.title: Karbrasse
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 of 13'. Saam met sy familie reël Nazzy geleenthede vir drag racing vir pret. Drag racing is hulle lewe, al is dit 'n risiko.

programme.title: KLOP!
programme.desc: 'S6/E31 of 43'. Ons leer ken die SA-hokkiespeler Taheera Augousti. Stewart Barlow vertel ons van die legendes in sy gemeenskap en ons maak 'n draai by Chazney Jacobus se studio.

programme.title: eNuus
programme.desc: 'S14/E338 of 365'. Daaglikse nuushooftrekke, sporthoogtepunte en weervooruitskouing in Afrikaans.

programme.title: Koortjies Met Jonathan Rubain
programme.desc: 'S4/E41 of 46'. Gewilde Suidooster akteur, Gantane Kusch kom vertel van sy grootword jare. Biskop Fanie Titus deel sy advies oor gesonde families. Dan lig die Kinders van Sion-groep die dak met hul musiek.

programme.title: Vuurdoop
programme.desc: Leerlinge van 'n gesiene seunskool moet een vakansie agterbly om boete te doen vir verskeie oortredings. Die nuwe koshuisvader het egter verskeie wraaksugtige planne teen hulle.

programme.title: Projek Dina
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 of 13'. Twee jong meisies verdwyn spoorloos by 'n braai in Bellville. Lux ondersoek vreemde aktiwiteite in die ou slaapkamer van 'n jong man wat al jare gelede verdwyn het.

programme.title: Diepe Waters
programme.desc: 'S1/E61 of 208'. Rossouw en Anja neem 'n groot besluit, terwyl Johan doen iets om sy privaatheid te beskerm. Pam gee vir Zelda 'n ultimatum, en Gys kry die skok van sy lewe.

programme.title: Diepe Waters
programme.desc: 'S1/E62 of 208'. Gys soek woorde om die nuus te breek, en Pam is moeg gewag - sy soek antwoorde by Zelda. Jacques reik uit na Anja, en Tommy maak 'n ontdekking.

programme.title: Diepe Waters
programme.desc: 'S1/E63 of 208'. Karla tel die spanning op tussen haar ouers, en maak dan 'n skokkende aankondiging. Pam en Zelda moet diep delf vir inligting, en Meghan het 'n plan om geld in te bring.

programme.title: Diepe Waters

programme.title: Arranged Love
programme.desc: A delightful romcom about a woman who left an arranged marriage and inheritance in India and began her own company. But when a problem threatens it, marriage is the solution.

programme.title: Breakin' All The Rules
programme.desc: Jaime Foxx becomes an overnight sensation in this comedy. When his fiancée breaks up with him, a man finds the inspiration to write a best-seller that skyrockets him to fame.

programme.desc: A sports drama filled with the ups and downs of family life. A father risks tearing his family apart when his son's chances to get a life-changing basketball scholarship are jeopardised.

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: After historic love letters start anonymously appearing in Kallie Sharp's mailbox, the hobby farmer searches for her secret admirer and opens herself up to love.

programme.desc: A star-studded voice cast (Ben Stiller, Chris Rock), loads of action, superb visuals and plenty of gags ensure the third attempt by the animals to return to NYC is a win.

programme.desc: A magical family film starring Emma Thompson. A mysterious nanny teaches seven naughty children some valuable lessons about being well-behaved.

programme.desc: The third in the Twilight series sees some fierce wolf vs vampire action. Bella is forced to choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five friends and former teammates reunite during the Fourth of July weekend. They soon discover that growing older doesn't always mean growing up.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock and Channing Tatum team up for this rom-com adventure. A romance novelist and her cover model get swept up in a kidnapping that lands them in a jungle adventure.

programme.desc: A hilarious, action-packed film based on comedian Bert Kreischer's college trip to Russia. Twenty years later, the trip catches up with him as he and his estranged father are kidnapped.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 12 - 2011'. 2011 was responsible for some huge titles, but it will also forever be associated with the Sony hack. Stumpy's back to walk you through a hectic year.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 12 - World of Warcraft: Who are the Dragonflights?'. Ginx original documentaries that explore the stories and secrets from all your favorite games.

programme.title: GINX News
programme.desc: 'S1/E103 of 127'. GINX Esports brings you the most up-to-date news, guides and videos on the games & streamers you love. PC. Console. Mobile.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this Spike Lee crime drama. A seasoned detective, a bank robber and a bank president face off in a high stakes hostage situation.

programme.title: The Gardener
programme.desc: An intense home invasion thriller. An immigrant working as a gardener at an English manor house must use his soldier skills to protect the family from invaders.

programme.title: A Killer Romance
programme.desc: If you like Mr. & Mrs. Smith, you'll enjoy this action romance. A secret serial killer discovers that her husband is a contract killer, thus pitting them against each other.

programme.title: Vampire's House Of Cain
programme.desc: A fanged crime thriller. A detective investigating a series of murders is caught in a war between two Vampire clans.

programme.title: King's Ransom
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson stars in this crime comedy. A soon-to-be-divorced businessman tries to fake his own kidnapping. Unfortunately, he's not the only one with a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Deadly History
programme.desc: The mystery hits closer to home in this instalment as Amy and Travis travel to New York to look into the disappearance of Amy's uncle.

programme.title: Who Am I?
programme.desc: An exciting update of Jackie Chan's 1998 classic action comedy. A delivery person finds his life turned upside down after he falls into amnesia and is framed for murder.

programme.title: Badges Of Fury
programme.desc: Martial arts legend Jet Li stars in this action comedy. A young detective is paired with his buddy cop to figure out who is responsible for a string of murders across Hong Kong.

programme.title: Assassin Club
programme.desc: Henry Golding and Noomi Rapace drive this action thriller. An assassin is given a contract to kill seven people around the world, only to discover the targets are also assassins.
Adam Driver fights for survival in this action-packed sci-fi thriller. After a catastrophic crash on a mysterious, unknown planet, an astronaut quickly discovers he's not alone.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Tom Cruise returns for another danger-filled mission. A retired IMF agent is pulled back in the field when an arms dealer threatens his fiancée's life.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: Christopher Nolan and Christian Bale return for the final, heart-stopping instalment of the hit franchise. Batman is up against it as he takes on his deadliest foe yet.

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: Gerard Butler fights against the odds in this war movie. A CIA operative and his translator flee from special forces in Afghanistan after exposing a covert mission.

programme.title: Master Gardener
programme.desc: A compelling thriller by Paul Schrader. A man with a dark past has reinvented himself as a horticulturist. However, when his employer's grand-niece arrives, his past begins to sprout.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Big Day for Baby Rhino'. Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino for a life-saving vaccine. Meanwhile, Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in bad shape.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Crocodile Love Story'. It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. But his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the pair in their new enclosure.

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Ready For The Jelly'. One of the blacktip reef sharks isn't eating properly, so the staff try to work out why. And, the aquarium's sea lion, Scarlett, graduates from pup kindergarten.

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Ophelia The Octopus'. Trainers get two rescued sea lions ready for eye surgery. Meanwhile, intelligent giant octopus, Ophelia, needs attention and the team head to the Bahamas.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Spring Break Cakes'. In the final challenge, the three remaining kid bakers battle it out for the title Kids Baking Champion. Who will take home $25,000?

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - I Lava Volcano'. 12 of the best young bakers in America compete to be Kids Baking Champion. Hosts and judges Valerie Bertinelli, Duff Goldman lead them through a series of tasty challenges.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Life Is A Carnival'. The carnival is in town for the Kids Baking Championship kick off. Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman ask 12 kid bakers to create carnival-themed cupcakes.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Comfort Food Dessert Imposters'. The 10 remaining kids must create a comfort food dessert imposter to keep their place at the table. Who will make it to the next round?

programme.title: Log Cabin Living

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - A New Hampshire Lakes Region Retreat'. First-time buyers dream of owning a cabin in New Hampshire's Lakes Region. They want a rustic, three-bedroom cabin with loads of features for under $215,000.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Oregon Green Acres Cabin Chase'. A family are relocating from San Diego to Bend, Oregon. They're on the hunt for a cabin with land so they can start their own alpaca farm.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Oregon Vacation Dream Cabin'. With a combined budget of $875,000, four friends struggle to find the perfect Oregon log cabin with enough room to host multi-family vacations.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S12/E13 - Record Breaking'. It's West Coast versus East Coast as Michelin-starred Jarad Gallagher and worldly Joshua Bedford aim to teach Bobby Flay a lesson.

programme.desc: 'S13/E1 - Not So Nice Sugar And Spice'. Talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to put their culinary skills to the test in the final round against genius chef Bobby Flay. Who will win?

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Otter Tale'. The team are desperate to find out what is causing Pinkie's, the Asian small-clawed otter, nose to bleed. Plus, baby alligators arrive, and they must learn how to eat.

programme.title: The Aquarium

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Warsaw'. In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the food is hearty. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores iconic Polish eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations

programme.title: Morning Live

programme.title: Media & Society
programme.desc: The show gives the viewers a platform to interrogate and keep the media accountable, through social media and phone-ins. A guest will be invited to formulate a discussion around every topic.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: The Week Ahead

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.desc: 'S3/E67 - The Great Indoors, Canderemy'. Isabella is upset the rain has ruined her chance of getting a Fireside Girl patch. The boys create a huge biodome in the yard, complete with forests and lakes, to help her.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Spoiler Alert'. Chance's parents take away his TV privileges, so Chance goes to great lengths to keep the season finale of his favourite show unspoiled.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Whatever Gets You Through the Night'. Herman has been invited to his first ever sleepover, but he is terrified because sometimes he does crazy things in his sleep.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E65 - Startrain'. Ladybug and Cat Noir challenge Max's mother, now Startrain. Our heroes will need help to stop her!

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E112 - Lizard Let Lie'. On the eve of Raven's big reality show debut, Alice lies to get out of a class speech, and Victor tries to get out of a surprise health inspection.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E114 - Sneaks and Geeks'. Booker, Neil and Ivy sneak out to go to an escape room that Raven has also snuck out to. Alice helps Victor after he accidentally drinks one of her experiments.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Grandma's Here to Stay'. Dusty is stressed out when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Blind Date'. The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E66 - Run, Candace, Run, Last Train to Bustville'. Candace wears special boots the boys have invented to make people super fast, but the ones she uses are unstable prototypes and things don't really go to plan.

programme.desc: 'S3/E67 - The Great Indoors, Canderemy'. Isabella is upset the rain has ruined her chance of getting a Fireside Girl patch. The boys create a huge biodome in the yard, complete with forests and lakes, to help her.

programme.title: Vikingskool
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Supply and Demand'. Arni's place at Viking Skool is in doubt afterMrHammerson announces the fearsome 'Tests of Worth', but Arni's attempts to get Hammersonout of the way backfire.

programme.title: Vikingskool
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Ylva'sl ove of a challenge leads her into a sailing contest with Doomhild around Sommerskys Isle - with Erik and Arni as her less-than-enthusiastic crew.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E76 - Skiddley Whiffers, Tour de Ferb'. Candace holds the record for playing the game Skiddley Whiffers, but the boys decide to make a giant version round the town.

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Neon Lights Out'. More chaos ensues at the Neon Lights Ball when Jay and Carlos reveal that they've been carpet-jacked and Ben mysteriously disappears. Who could be behind the chaos?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E83 - Psycomedian'. A famous comedian gets akumatized into Psycomedian. Able to impose any emotions on anyone, he wants to wipe the smiles off everyone's faces.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E84 - Furious Fu'. Ladybug and Cat Noir face someone they know well...and never imagined they would have to fight someday.

programme.title: Zombies: The Re-animated Series
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Grill or Be Grilled'. Zed and Addison use lime soda to try to win a barbecue contest, but instead they create a culinary disaster: a pizza monster that wants THEM on a plate!

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - Hidden Hero'. Jake realizes that he can use his power anonymously to help people in need so he sets out to become an undercover hero. Meanwhile, Vic challenges Celia to a pepper eating contest.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - The Haunted Jukebox'. When a haunted jukebox sends Amy and Hartley to an alternate dimension of Valley View, they must figure out how to get home before they are trapped in Monster Town forever.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - The Promposal'. Amy agrees to go to prom with Milo as friends, but finds out that she wasn't his first choice. Colby and Eva train Vic to perfect his power.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E90 - The Doonkleberry Imperative, Buford Confidential'. When Mom is out of Doonkelberries for her famous Doonkelberry pie, the boys rush out to find some for her.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E85 - Excaliferb!'. In this time shift episode, the boys are transported to the Middle Ages. They set out to find the legendary sword Excaliferb, which they need to defeat evil sorcerer Millifishmirtz. (S3 Ep20)

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E88 - Delivery of Destiny/Let's Bounce'. As we follow Paul the Delivery Man around his stops - Phineas and Ferb's house, Doofenshmirtz's Evil Inc. and OWCA - we discover a new hero when Paul helps to save the town.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E63 - Little Buddy/Zen Garden'. Cricket mentors a wild-child and Tilly develops a cult following. Nancy tries to prove herself on the farm. Bill struggles to relax at a fancy spa with Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E64 - No Service/Takened'. Cricket is halted at a convenience store due to their 'No Shoes, No Service' policy. When Remy throws Vasquez a surprise party, Bill's secret-keeping is put to the test.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E65 - Green Greens/Truce Bomb'. Tilly and Bill set off on an epic journey to recycle a fluorescent light bulb at an e-waste center. Tilly tries to solve a long-standing feud between Gramma and Mr. Grigorian.

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Bitter Sitter'. Gretel becomes invisible while Bailey competes in a spelling bee, Gretel and Bailey face an interesting babysitter.

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Power of Powers/Churro's Day Out'. Gretel and Bailey experiment with Gretel's powers at the beach, Churro has a day out while the family gets a portrait done.

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Crimson Haste Makes Waste/ Break-Stuff Club, The'. Hamster and Gretel encounter a super speedy villain at the mall, Kevin gets Saturday detention in order to find a vandal.

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Over the Hill/The Ice Queen Cometh'. Gretel and Bailey shadow Veronica Hill for career day, Hamster and Gretel encounter an ice queen.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Skates, Lies & Videos'. When Paris, Ari and Simone learn that a music video is being recorded at Saturdays, they decide they have to be in it! But they have to age up to look eighteen.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Comb Back to Me'. London begins his new job as the rink's DJ and starts to embarrass Paris. So Paris hatches a plan to turn London's world upside-down so her world can be right side up again.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Too Many Cooks'. Paris asks if Simone and Ari can work at her parents' baking biz. Cal and Deb reluctantly agree, but before long, Paris is working overtime to clean up her friends' mess.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Why Are You So Meme?'. Paris and Sonia Little, of 2-Cute-4-U, show up at Saturdays in the same hairdo, touching off a 'Who-Wore-It-Best' meme war!

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Roll a Mile in My Skates'. It's Golden Mentor Day at Saturdays and Duchess has assigned We-B-Girlz the amazing 'Hot Wheels!' But when she skates out, they recognize...a familiar face.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Don't Clown the Duchess'. Paris throws a surprise party for the 25th Anniversary of Duchess' hit rap song 'Chi Girlz.' But Duchess feels guilty when her ex-rap partner, Princess, arrives as a Hip Hop Clown!

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The Chocolate Club'. Ari's first sleepover with her new besties is a bust when it lines up with Paris and Simone's 'Chocolate Club.'

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Nightmare on Paris Street'. Paris rallies everyone to throw a block party, and the girls go to the scariest house for a signature. They suddenly find themselves inside with the house's owner, Ms. Whitaker.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - The Haunted Jukebox'. When a haunted jukebox sends Amy and Hartley to an alternate dimension of Valley View, they must figure out how to get home before they are trapped in Monster Town forever.

programme.title: Klik Klub - Zwakala
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Loot'. Gear up for a fun day at Klik Klub! With Lootlove as our special guest, we play thumb wars and cook Cheesy Pea and Mushroom Pasta. Learn to play fair and embrace losing.

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Life as We Knew It'. With Pretty and Scary stuck in the Underworld, Grim sends her assistant to replace them. Frankie and Remy have to finish Grim's task at the escape room so they can get them back.

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - The Girl Most Likely to Come Back to Life'. Frankie campaigns to win 'Best Smile' for the class yearbook. Her plans are interrupted when a paranormal investigator/podcaster comes to town to expose Frankie and Grim.

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Back to Life'. Frankie Ripp has the perfect life, then an unfortunate incident sends her to the Underworld. The Grim Reaper allows her to return home alongside some Underworld guardians.

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - My Soul-called Life'. Grim tasks Frankie with finding 'The Book of Souls' for her, but when she and Remy find it, curiosity gets the best of Remy.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E63 - Little Buddy/Zen Garden'. Cricket mentors a wild-child and Tilly develops a cult following. Nancy tries to prove herself on the farm. Bill struggles to relax at a fancy spa with Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E65 - Green Greens/Truce Bomb'. Tilly and Bill set off on an epic journey to recycle a fluorescent light bulb at an e-waste center. Tilly tries to solve a long-standing feud between Gramma and Mr. Grigorian.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E73 - Tri-Stone Area, Doof Dynasty'. The boys are back in the Stone Age, and invent the wheel. Back in history, the boys are in Feudal China where they must rescue a princess kidnapped by Doofus Khan.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E75 - Mommy Can You Hear Me?, Road Trip'. Candace is in bed with an injured ankle, so the boys help stop her getting bored - and she unwittingly saves their cosmonaut friend from an approaching obstacle.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - The Haunted Jukebox'. When a haunted jukebox sends Amy and Hartley to an alternate dimension of Valley View, they must figure out how to get home before they are trapped in Monster Town forever.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - The Promposal'. Amy agrees to go to prom with Milo as friends, but finds out that she wasn't his first choice. Colby and Eva train Vic to perfect his power.

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Back to Life'. Frankie Ripp has the perfect life, then an unfortunate incident sends her to the Underworld. The Grim Reaper allows her to return home alongside some Underworld guardians.

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - My Soul-called Life'. Grim tasks Frankie with finding 'The Book of Souls' for her, but when she and Remy find it, curiosity gets the best of Remy.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E112 - Lizard Let Lie'. On the eve of Raven's big reality show debut, Alice lies to get out of a class speech, and Victor tries to get out of a surprise health inspection.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E114 - Sneaks and Geeks'. Booker, Neil and Ivy sneak out to go to an escape room that Raven has also snuck out to. Alice helps Victor after he accidentally drinks one of her experiments.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E116 - Reality Check'. During the first day of shooting of Raven's reality show, Raven and Booker accidentally reveal secrets on camera. The reality show producers think Victor is boring.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E117 - Working for the Weeknd'. Booker, Neil and Ivy do everything they can to get tickets to The Weeknd concert. Alice's classmate uninvites her to the same concert. Raven tries to cheer her up.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E121 - You've Got Sale'. The Baxters host a garage sale and try to one-up their neighbors. Alice sells her Tasha doll only to regret the decision, and Booker stresses over his college choice.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E118 - Drop It Like It's Hot!'. Raven is doing a clothing drop, but a miscommunication sends her fans to the Baxter house. Neil and Booker get into a disagreement. Alice has to help Pop-Pop at the Chill Grill.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E66 - Run, Candace, Run, Last Train to Bustville'. Candace wears special boots the boys have invented to make people super fast, but the ones she uses are unstable prototypes and things don't really go to plan.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - West Virginia State Penitentiary'. The team heads to Moundsville, West Virginia, to investigate what was once one of the top ten most-violent prisons in America.

programme.title: Fright Club
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Ghostin' For The Gold'. Marcus claims to have scientific proof of inter-dimensional travel. Dalen shows the guys what Bigfoot does when he's tired of the paranormal paparazzi.

programme.title: Conjuring Kesha
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Songs For The Dead'. Kesha and pop star Betty Who explore the mysterious Antoinette Hall. The opera house recently reopened, awakening spirits and stirring long-buried secrets inside.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Cresson Sanatorium, Part Two'. Dakota blindsides the team at an abandoned Pennsylvania sanatorium. Can they handle a night in the cell block where a horrific serial killer was housed?

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Aliens In Alaska And Bog Body'. Don Wildman examines one of the most frightening UFO encounters of all time and a pair of handcuffs designed to trap the world's greatest magician.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Blackout'. Amy, Adam and Chip answer a couple's desperate call for help. The wife fears a dark entity is possessing her husband, causing blackouts and fits of anger.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Return To The Mother Lode'. As the battle for McCarthy wages on, a team of experts work to locate the only known entrance into the Mother Lode mine. But will they find it?

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The End Of The Frontier'. Neil breaks through to the Mother Lode mine but locals are too busy defending against waking bears to stop him and Jenny goes on a solo bear-hunt of her own.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S104/E9 - New Life In New Zealand'. A Florida physician and his wife are moving to Whitianga, New Zealand. He wants a property they can renovate together, but she wants a move-in ready place.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S104/E10 - Pura Vida In Costa Rica'. A Canadian couple have bought two restaurants in Brasilito, Costa Rica. Now, they need to find the perfect home to live in - can they compromise on budget?

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S3/E25 - Disco Bigfoot'. Compelling evidence brings the team back to a surprisingly squatchy New Jersey. Cliff breaks from the team to squatch with his friend, comedian Bobcat Goldthwait.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Alaska's Bigfoot Island'. Bigfoot experts are called to Prince of Wales Island, Alaska to investigate a recent spike in Sasquatch activity. But can they track the elusive beast?

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Caught on Tape'. Some convincing Bigfoot footage leads to an inexplicable encounter in the forests of North Carolina. Could the team be close to finding this legendary creature?

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Bigfoot Crossing in Georgia'. The team is investigating a Bigfoot sighting in north Georgia when they make a shocking discovery. Are they finally closing in on this legendary beast?

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Swamp Ape'. The crew come to the aid of a family in Florida who believe Bigfoot is living on their property. Can they confirm this legendary creature is at large in the Deep South?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E3 - The First Super Computer, Flying Under Fire and Dighton Rock'. Don examines a boulder covered in strange carvings, a sword belonging to an explorer and the bust of a leader who tried to untangle an ancient puzzle.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E4 - King Neptune, Friday Night Bank Robber and Karluk's Last Voyage'. Don Wildman examines a patriotic pig that helped fund World War Two. Plus, the story of two activists who risked their lives to save the whales.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E5 - Jap Herron, Hidden Rockwell and Ticket to Fly'. Don Wildman unveils the story behind a novel that was supposedly written by the ghost of a legendary author. And, a painting that isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Operation Mincemeat, Texas Prison Rodeo and Tully Monster'. Don Wildman examines a fossil belonging to one of history's strangest creatures. Plus, the story of a gold nugget that helped set off the gold rush.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E7 - Reckless, Thousand Island Dressing and the Tornado'. Don Wildman uncovers a culinary mystery about a popular salad dressing. Plus, the story of a hero horse who put her life on the line to save others.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Aliens Vs. Stalin At Area 51'. Experts investigate whether the Roswell UFO incident was a Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, or is the story just another cover-up?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Saturn's Moon Monsters'. When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Planet Of The Metal Aliens'. Experts investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be the home to an alien civilization after a new discovery confirms that life can thrive on such a world.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Did Aliens Nuke Mars?'. A strange discovery by NASA's Mars Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago - could this be true?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Aliens In The Amazon'. Neil Armstrong led an expedition into the Amazon seeking a library apparently made by aliens. Did a close encounter on his moonwalk inspire his quest?

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Thaw & Order'. Plans for tourism at the Motherlode mine push forward. The last days of winter threaten life as they know it and the locals must once again band together.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - The Cave In'. Neil starts the first Motherlode tour, but complications could spell the end of his work. Jeremy embarks on a bear hunt but encounter something even more dangerous.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Stage Fright'. Amy, Adam and Chip are granted exclusive access to the Paramount Theatre in New Jersey. The location's bright future is marred by a tragic past.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S3/E14 - Into Bigfoot's Den'. When Russell films a shocking piece of video evidence, the whole team assembles to follow the trail. Their search culminates in a monumental discovery.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Trapper's Birthday'. After a rip-roaring fistfight in the woods, the AIMS team gathers to remember Trapper on his birthday. Huckleberry busts out a jar of his famous concoction.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Fairfield County Infirmary'. The team's terrifying road trip takes them to a house of horrors in Lancaster, Ohio. Dakota tasks each member to explore the property alone.

programme.title: Die Uitdaging
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Aktrise Angelique Gerber word uitgedaag om deur die Atlantis duine te gaan jaag saam met Iana. Angelique vertel meer oor haar kinders, haar passie vir GBV beskerming en haar veelsydige loopbaan.

programme.title: Waar's my trourok?
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Toekomstige bruide en hul geliefdes kuier saam met Mila Guy by die Blanco Bridal-boetiek om trourokke aan te pas. Menings en smaak verskil. Gaan die bruid met 'n glimlag wegstap of gaan die soektog in trane eindig?

programme.title: Die Groot Afskud
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Ses weke vandat ons spanne begin het om hul lewens te verander, maar dit kan lank voel as jy van droë hoenderborsie tot droë hoenderborsie lewe. Minette, ons dieëtkundige, wys dat gesond eet lekker kan wees.

programme.title: Klankbank
programme.desc: 'S2/E12'. Dis die laaste semi-finaal van die seisoen en Martin, Anja en Mandy is terug om om dinge uit te baklei. Daar is lekker speletjies en 'n spesiale optrede deur Droomsindroom.

programme.title: Klankbank
programme.desc: 'S2/E13'. Dis die seisoenfinaal en Dirk, Zandri en Martin is terug om te kompeteer vir die groot boerpot. Hulle word bederf deur 'n skouspelagtige vertoning deur Andriëtte.

programme.title: Klankbank
programme.desc: 'S3/E1'. Die Klankbank is weer oop vir 'n nuwe seisoen en drie spelers gaan hulle alles gee om die bank te probeer beroof. Met 'n spesiale optrede deur Biggy.

programme.title: Slimkoppe met Netwerk24
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Die kenners bêre hulle brein-bymiddels en Susan speel TMO - dié vier gesels oor sport se kroeks, kullers en weirdo's.

programme.title: Waar's my trourok?

programme.title: My Plek Of Joune?
programme.desc: 'S10/E5'. Alicia en Morné stamp koppe oor 'n deurloopvertrek waar 'n mak spinnekop tans baas is. Kan Isabel en Melt met R15 000 en binne een dag stylvrede skep?

programme.title: Sterkbek
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Paxton Fiellies, die Idols-wenner en Suid-Afrikaanse liefling, durf die Sterkbek-uitdaging aan saam met haar vriend en vervaardiger, Clayton Damons, in Kaapstad se gewilde Dias Tavern.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S24/E3'. Graeme Jarvie boer naby Greytown, KZN met aartappels en mielies. Sy produksiegleuf vir die beste markpryse word haarfyn bestuur. Hy het ook 'n toepassing ontwikkel waardeur varsprodukte direk bemark kan word.

programme.title: Skep nog
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. Kaap-Maleise koskenner, Cariema Isaacs, maak geurige breyani met tamatie-en-uieslaai. René gebruik van die karringmelk vir tres leches-koek met Viëtnamese koffie. Blikkies word omskep in skryfbehoeftehouers.

programme.title: Platteland Toe
programme.desc: 'S4/E8'. Ons besoek Sedgefield en George met 'n riviervaart waar jy die natuur in sy volle glorie ervaar. Op safari ontmoet die see die kus wat enige seeliefhebber se droom is. Ons besoek 'n treinmuseum en geniet 'n rit bergop.

programme.title: Trou, Trek of Toer?
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. David en Bianca ontmoet vir verloofdes, René en Karlo. Die paartjie moet kies tussen 'n asemrowende troubestemming in Hartbeespoort, 'n huis perfek vir pasgetroudes en 'n romantiese wegbreek in Parys!

programme.title: Outopsie
programme.desc: 'S3/E8'. n Verloofde paartjie word daarvan beskuldig dat hulle die dood van hul kind veroorsaak het nadat sy in hulle arms sterf. Na die outopsie besluit Dr. Van Staden daar is veel meer agter die storie.

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S8/E6'. Nisboere ontdek 'n juweel van 'n neutboerdery by Prieska waar pimper-, amandel- en pekanneute verbou word. By Digby Upington ontdek ons 'n kameelmelkplaas. Plus, ons vind meer uit oor heuningboerdery in die Kaap.

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas
programme.desc: 'S12/E2'. Kyle Ruiters was van jongs af gefassineerd met reeksmoordenaars. Wanneer hy uiteindelik besluit om Lynette Volschenk te teiken, wonder mens of daar ooit hoop was vir die jong man.

programme.title: Die Groot Afskud
